attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY WIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY, WIRM.BK_SS_CD ) + SM_MAX.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY AS REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY ,     
CASE WHEN WIRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY IN (-9999,-6666) THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000 ,1011800)*-1  ELSE WIRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY END SALES_ORDER_KEY,
CASE WHEN WIRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IN (-9999,-6666) THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000 ,1011800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
CASE WHEN WIRM.PRODUCT_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.PRODUCT_KEY=-998 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.PRODUCT_KEY=-997 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.PRODUCT_KEY END PRODUCT_KEY,
CASE WHEN WIRM.AR_TRX_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.AR_TRX_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1  WHEN WIRM.AR_TRX_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1WHEN WIRM.AR_TRX_KEY=-4444 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 ELSE WIRM.AR_TRX_KEY END AR_TRX_KEY,
 CASE WHEN WIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1   WHEN WIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 
 WHEN WIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-4444 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 ELSE WIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
CASE WHEN WIRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1  WHEN WIRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 
  WHEN WIRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY=-4444 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 ELSE WIRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY END BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY  ,
 CASE WHEN WIRM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END END_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
 CASE WHEN WIRM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
 CASE WHEN WIRM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
 CASE WHEN WIRM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
 CASE WHEN WIRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    ,
GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    ,
SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,
CASE WHEN WIRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT IN (-9999,-999) THEN RANDOM(1000000,1003000)*-1 ELSE WIRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT END BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN WIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT=-9999 THEN RANDOM(8000000,8001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT=-999 THEN RANDOM(8005000,8006800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT END BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
CASE WHEN WIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT=-9999 THEN RANDOM(8000000,8001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT=-999 THEN RANDOM(8005000,8006800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT END BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    ,
DD_GL_DATETIME                ,
DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        ,
BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME            ,
DV_FISCAL_DT                  ,
DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     ,
DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD          ,
DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD ,
DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD            ,
BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD       ,
AR_TRX_DATETIME               ,
REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         ,
DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             ,
DV_CHARGES_FLG                ,
DV_MISC_FLG                   ,
DV_SERVICE_FLG                ,
DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     ,
DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       ,
DV_REVENUE_FLG                ,
DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       ,
DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      ,
DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        ,
DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     ,
DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     ,
DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY           ,
DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY         ,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           ,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           ,
BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         ,
BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD    ,
GL_DT                         ,
BK_SS_CD                      ,
DV_EXTENDED_QTY               ,
GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     ,
GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,
OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        ,
ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              ,
TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,
WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   ,
TRANSACTION_DT                ,
GL_POSTED_DTM                 ,
RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT    ,
DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT    ,
DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT      ,
SPLIT_PCT                     ,
BK_COMPANY_CODE               ,
BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE           ,
DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG       ,
REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          ,
CASE WHEN WIRM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IN (-9999,-6666) THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000 ,1011800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   ,
CASE WHEN WIRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=-998 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=-997 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY END DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
DV_ERP_DEAL_ID                ,
BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD           ,
DV_FMV_FLG                    ,
DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     ,
DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT        ,
DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT   ,
BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT     ,
DSV_FLG                       ,
CASE WHEN WIRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1   
WHEN WIRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY= -7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 
  WHEN WIRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-4444 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1  ELSE WIRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY /*added as a part of CDC Q4FY18*/,
CASE WHEN WIRM.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY IN (-999,-9999) THEN Random(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY END AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME          ,
XCAT_FLG                      ,
BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            ,
RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           ,
ELA_FLG                       ,
CASE WHEN WIRM.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY END  ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY ,
DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT   ,
DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD ,
POB_TYPE_CD                   ,
NRS_TRANSITION_FLG            ,
DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG   ,
TSV_ACCRUALS_CD               ,
ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY           ,
MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY            ,
LAST_RECORD_FLG   ,
SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID         ,
SALES_MOTION_CD               ,
DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
,WIRM.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /* ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY20 ICPM ACCOUNTING_RULE */ 
,BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
FROM $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_MEASURE_SMR_FIN_AGGR WIRM
INNER JOIN
( SELECT COALESCE(MAX(REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY),0) AS REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_INV_REV_MEASURE 
WHERE (REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('AR','AR-OOD','AR-1C','DRCT_AS_T'))
) SM_MAX
ON 1=1
WHERE (REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('AR','AR-OOD','AR-1C','DRCT_AS_T'))

/* WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_INV_REV_MEASURE NIRM
 WHERE BDL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=NIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
 AND BDL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD) */	 

UNION ALL		  
SELECT
REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
CASE WHEN WIRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY IN (-9999,-6666) THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000 ,1011800)*-1  ELSE WIRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY END SALES_ORDER_KEY,
CASE WHEN WIRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IN (-9999,-6666) THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000 ,1011800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
CASE WHEN WIRM.PRODUCT_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.PRODUCT_KEY=-998 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.PRODUCT_KEY=-997 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.PRODUCT_KEY END PRODUCT_KEY,
CASE WHEN WIRM.AR_TRX_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.AR_TRX_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1  WHEN WIRM.AR_TRX_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1WHEN WIRM.AR_TRX_KEY=-4444 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 ELSE WIRM.AR_TRX_KEY END AR_TRX_KEY,
 CASE WHEN WIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1   WHEN WIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 
 WHEN WIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-4444 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 ELSE WIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
CASE WHEN WIRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1  WHEN WIRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 
  WHEN WIRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY=-4444 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 ELSE WIRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY END BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY  ,
 CASE WHEN WIRM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END END_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
 CASE WHEN WIRM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
 CASE WHEN WIRM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
 CASE WHEN WIRM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
 CASE WHEN WIRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    ,
GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    ,
SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,
CASE WHEN WIRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT IN (-9999,-999) THEN RANDOM(1000000,1003000)*-1 ELSE WIRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT END BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN WIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT=-9999 THEN RANDOM(8000000,8001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT=-999 THEN RANDOM(8005000,8006800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT END BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
CASE WHEN WIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT=-9999 THEN RANDOM(8000000,8001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT=-999 THEN RANDOM(8005000,8006800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT END BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    ,
DD_GL_DATETIME                ,
DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        ,
BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME            ,
DV_FISCAL_DT                  ,
DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     ,
DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD          ,
DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD ,
DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD            ,
BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD       ,
AR_TRX_DATETIME               ,
REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         ,
DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             ,
DV_CHARGES_FLG                ,
DV_MISC_FLG                   ,
DV_SERVICE_FLG                ,
DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     ,
DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       ,
DV_REVENUE_FLG                ,
DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       ,
DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      ,
DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        ,
DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     ,
DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     ,
DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY           ,
DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY         ,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           ,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           ,
BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         ,
BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD    ,
GL_DT                         ,
BK_SS_CD                      ,
DV_EXTENDED_QTY               ,
GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     ,
GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,
OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        ,
ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              ,
TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,
WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   ,
TRANSACTION_DT                ,
GL_POSTED_DTM                 ,
RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT    ,
DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT    ,
DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT      ,
SPLIT_PCT                     ,
BK_COMPANY_CODE               ,
BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE           ,
DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG       ,
REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          ,
CASE WHEN WIRM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IN (-9999,-6666) THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=-7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000 ,1011800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   ,
CASE WHEN WIRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=-998 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=-997 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY END DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
DV_ERP_DEAL_ID                ,
BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD           ,
DV_FMV_FLG                    ,
DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     ,
DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT        ,
DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT   ,
BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT     ,
DSV_FLG                       ,
CASE WHEN WIRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WIRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1   
WHEN WIRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY= -7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 
  WHEN WIRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-4444 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1  ELSE WIRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY /*added as a part of CDC Q4FY18*/,
CASE WHEN WIRM.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY IN (-999,-9999) THEN Random(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY END AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME          ,
XCAT_FLG                      ,
BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            ,
RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           ,
ELA_FLG                       ,
CASE WHEN WIRM.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WIRM.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY END  ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY ,
DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT   ,
DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD ,
POB_TYPE_CD                   ,
NRS_TRANSITION_FLG            ,
DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG   ,
TSV_ACCRUALS_CD               ,
ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY           ,
MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY            ,
LAST_RECORD_FLG ,
SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID         ,
SALES_MOTION_CD               ,
DV_TRANSACTION_KEY		 
,WIRM.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /* ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY20 ICPM ACCOUNTING_RULE */ 
,BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
FROM $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_MEASURE_SMR_FIN_AGGR WIRM
WHERE 
REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ( 'IND_ADJ' )
